query:
-- Inserir itens do orçamento
INSERT INTO budgetItems (budgetId, productId, materialId, quantity, length, width, squareMeter, unitPrice, totalPrice, createdAt) 
VALUES 
(1, 1, 1, 1, 0, 0, 5000, 15000, 75000, NOW()),
(1, 2, 2, 2, 0, 0, 3000, 14000, 84000, NOW()),
(1, 3, 1, 1, 0, 0, 2000, 13000, 26000, NOW());

-- Verificar itens inseridos
SELECT COUNT(*) as totalItens FROM budgetItems WHERE budgetId = 1;
